mapper.select: SELECT id as "id", order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount as "amount", currency as "currency", payment_method as "paymentMethod", gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", gateway_response as "gatewayResponse", retry_count as "retryCount", failure_reason as "failureReason", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM payment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM payment GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM payment WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod}

SELECT id as "id", order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount as "amount", currency as "currency", payment_method as "paymentMethod", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime" FROM payment WHERE payment_method = #{paymentMethod} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM payment WHERE state_id IN ('FAILED', 'ABANDONED')

SELECT id as "id", order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount as "amount", payment_method as "paymentMethod", failure_reason as "failureReason", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime" FROM payment WHERE state_id IN ('FAILED', 'ABANDONED') ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT CAST(created_time AS DATE) as "paymentDate", COUNT(*) as "transactionCount", SUM(amount) as "totalRevenue", currency as "currency" FROM payment WHERE state_id IN ('SUCCEEDED', 'SETTLED') GROUP BY CAST(created_time AS DATE), currency ORDER BY "paymentDate" DESC

SELECT id as "id", order_id as "orderId", amount as "amount", currency as "currency", payment_method as "paymentMethod", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime" FROM payment WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id as "id", order_id as "orderId", customer_id as "customerId", amount as "amount", currency as "currency", payment_method as "paymentMethod", gateway_transaction_id as "gatewayTransactionId", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM payment WHERE id = #{id}
